programme.title: Eli
programme.desc: Eli is a skilled trickster who manages to fool the police and escape from their clutches several times. Due to his abilities, a retired policeman seeks his help to solve a crime. Starring Vadivelu.

programme.title: Mr. Birthday

Tuesday Report: My Teacher, My Lifelong Friend Ep03
programme.desc: In this series, we feature stories of extraordinary teachers & the students whose lives they have had a deep & lasting impact on, as well as the lessons that have shaped their childhood.

programme.title: James's Going Places S21 Ep08
programme.desc: Taiwan's famed host, James, takes you on a market adventure packed with local delicacies. Join foodies experts to reconnect with nostalgic flavours you've never forgotten.

programme.title: Singer 2026 - Malaysia Ep01
programme.desc: A powerhouse collaboration between Astro & Mango TV, this competition assembles an elite lineup of Malaysia's A-list vocalists & trending artists for an ultimate test of their vocal prowess.

programme.title: The True Journey Ep07
programme.desc: Lai Lok Yi leads a return to early 2000s school days as the cast recalls the F4 craze. Mayanne and Tiffany fold lucky stars, while Nicole and Emi revisit ICQ and classic mobile ringtones.

programme.title: Freedom Travelers S2 Ep02

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese….

programme.title: Search4Hurt - Season 4
programme.desc: TV's most savage social experiment returns as Search4Hurt starts its mission to find the fittest everyday Aussies to join their hybrid sporting team, starting with HurtCamp.

programme.title: Search4Hurt - Season 4
programme.desc: After online qualifiers six male and female athletes take on the last test to claim their spot on Team S4H, that test is HurtCamp.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips
programme.desc: Western Australia's Murchison GeoRegion is well known for its' ancient landscapes andbrilliant skies, this is the real outback. We take a journey through a region full of stories dating back tothe earth's beginning, around 4½ billion years ago.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips
programme.desc: Part One of a journey along the Kamilaroi Highway, from Willow Tree to Moree, in NewSouth Wales, taking in The Great Divide on our way to the Great Australian Outback. Magnificentlandscapes, awesome attractions, and we meet some really cool people as we make our way througha region which traditional owners are spiritually connected to.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara goes to Melbourne to explore the food culture and find the best local ingredients. First stop, the Queen Victoria Market.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

programme.title: Don't Drive Here
programme.desc: Half of Mongolia lives in this city. And they drive their cars like they ride their horses: fast and furious.

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: In this episode a 40-ton lorry rammed full of scrap metal overturns and spills its steel load across a major A road during rush hour, and Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is called to the scene. 25 tonnes of metal must be removed from the lorry before it can be lifted and with a damaged 5th wheel, it's a job that will push Steve and his team to the limit. At Crouch HQ there's excitement in the air

programme.title: Live - The Love Laugh Live Show

programme.title: Live - The Love Laugh Live Show

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: Pete and Ellie Wagner, a couple, decide to adopt three siblings Lizzie, Juan and Lita. But trouble knocks at their door when the children's troublesome birth mother is back in the frame.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: Greg Focker and his fiancée Pam decide to make their respective parents meet before their wedding. However, the Fockers' relaxed attitude does not go down well with Pam's family.

programme.title: Lay the Favorite
programme.desc: Ambitious about living the life of a cocktail waitress, a lap dancer tries her luck in Las Vegas. However, her life takes an unexpected turn after she falls in love with a sports gambler.

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets
programme.desc: Superman and his super-dog Krypto share the same power and fight crime together. However, when Superman gets kidnapped, Krypto trains harder to rescue him.

programme.title: Due Date
programme.desc: Peter Highman must reach Los Angeles to make it in time for his child's birth. However, he is forced to travel with Ethan, an aspiring actor, who frequently lands him in trouble.

programme.title: Maid in Manhattan
programme.desc: The heir to a political dynasty falls for a hotel maid who is also single mother, thinking of her to be a socialite. However, both realise that they are completely different as the truth comes out.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: When Kiki helps facilitate a final public appearance between her famous boss and her estranged husband, she experiences an unexpected spark of attraction and falls for him.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace, who is vacationing in Paris with her friends and stepsister, is mistaken for a British heiress. Later, the three women are whisked away to Monte Carlo, where they discover royalty and romance.

programme.title: What's Love Got to Do with It?
programme.desc: Filmmaker Zoe Stevenson documents her Pakistani best friend's journey to an arranged marriage. Over time, the process begins to make her challenge her own attitudes towards relationships.

programme.desc: In this third instalment of this series, Superman battles a supercomputer and the evil businessman exploiting it.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: A royal visit from the King and Queen of England unleashes scandal, romance and intrigue that leave the future of Downton hanging in the balance.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Following in his father's footsteps, Lt. Frank Drebin Jr. has the particular set of skills... to lead Police Squad and save the world!

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Surveilled
programme.desc: Documentary centered on investigative reporter Ronan Farrow takes a deep dive into the growing spies-for-hire industry.

programme.title: Last Breath
programme.desc: An emotionally charged action thriller of a commercial diver who after a freak accident is trapped on the bottom of the North Sea.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: Superman returns after five years in space to find Lois engaged and Lex Luthor with a sinister plan that will endanger America.

programme.title: Gravity
programme.desc: A brilliant medical engineer and a veteran astronaut go on a seemingly routine spacewalk that ends up in a huge disaster.

programme.title: The Bunny And Charles Manson
programme.desc: Investigate the mysterious murders that intersect the world of Playboy.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: Years after the death of Maximus, Lucius is forced into the Colosseum after his home is conquered by tyrannical twin Roman Emperors.

programme.title: The Bikeriders
programme.desc: The Bikeriders chronicles the story of The Vandals, a fictional motorcycle club that transforms into a more sinister gang over the course of a decade.

programme.title: The Woman In The Yard
programme.desc: A woman crippled by grief must rally to protect herself and her children from the grasp of the woman who simply won’t leave them alone.

programme.title: Sugar
programme.desc: An HBO Original film of a baseball pitcher who struggles to pull his family out of poverty.

programme.title: Fahrenheit 451
programme.desc: Based on Ray Bradbury's novel of the same name, this film is set in a future where the media is outlawed, history is rewritten and 'firemen' burn books.

programme.title: Ángel Rodríguez
programme.desc: An HBO Original Movie, Angel Rodriguez tells the tale of Nicole, a social worker, and her relationship with Angel, a bright but troubled inner-city teen.

programme.title: Angus, Thongs And Perfect Snogging
programme.desc: Eccentric but loveable 14 year-old Georgia Nicolson tries to overcome the trials and tribulations of growing up.

programme.title: Einstein And Eddington
programme.desc: A story about the unlikely partnership during World War I between a young British scientist named Arthur Eddington and the brilliant physicist, Albert Einstein.

programme.title: Native Son
programme.desc: A young African-American named Bigger Thomas takes a job working for an affluent Chicago white family - a decision that will change his life forever.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A veteran assigned to extract Earth's remaining resources begins to question his mission and his being.

programme.title: Iron Jawed Angels

programme.title: As You Like It
programme.desc: A romantic adventure in which Rosalind and Orlando's celebrated courtship is against a backdrop of political rivalry, banishment and exile.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Three divorced women seek revenge on the husbands who left them for younger women.

programme.title: Novocaine
programme.desc: When the girl of his dreams is taken hostage, Nathan turns his inability to feel pain into an unexpected strength in the fight to get her back.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 9
programme.desc: Asri is falsely accused of embezzling funds by his ex employer at One Up Agency. He is remanded and tries to seek Hani's help to bail him out. While Herzy and Ema keep Asri's predicament a secret from the rest at Raja Bundle, Zafrul blatantly reveals to Amirul about Asri.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 10
programme.desc: Asri is determined not to let the setbacks befall him lately to affect Raja Bundle. Asri comes up with a new marketing and business plan for his HBB sellers. However, Kak Sal became increasingly suspicious when the police came to seize Asri's business accounts. Amirul urges Hani to accept Zafrul's proposal. Asri is confident he knows the identity of the culprit who had framed him for embezzlement.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 11

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 13

programme.desc: Join Pinkfong and friends for more fun and adventure.

programme.title: Slimed Science - EP 27
programme.desc: Did you know that there are many ways to harness heat energy in places where we least expect? Dr Slime taps into unexpected sources and applies heat creatively to daily life.

programme.title: Slimed Science - EP 28
programme.desc: Dr Slime is helping his filmmaker friend with some videos – but there is no sound! What might the characters in the video be saying? How can Dr Slime help his friend to re-create sound for the video?

programme.title: The Woohoos! - EP 7
programme.desc: Join Wynona the puffin, Iggy the wolfhound, Scotty the highland bull and Ellie the hare as they wonder at the natural world all around them on Wise Island. Each episode brings an exciting "Ooo" moment, a new discovery that needs explaining, and when they find the answer what do they say? "WOOHOO!"

programme.title: The Woohoos! - EP 8
programme.desc: Join Wynona the puffin, Iggy the wolfhound, Scotty the highland bull and Ellie the hare as they wonder at the natural world all around them on Wise Island. programme.title: Pfffirates - EP 21
programme.desc: On Calypso Island, three crews are taught Pfffiracy by the legendary Captain Lamar. This tough training program ranges from sailing exercises and treasure hunting competitions to cannon firing and accosting enemy ships! But it would take more than that for Pat, Lily or Stede to give up. When a Pfffirate has friends to count on, nothing is impossible!

programme.title: Pfffirates - EP 22

programme.title: Agents Of Sprawl - EP 8
programme.desc: UnyX is out of the picture. Without her guidance, Zayd, Meiling and Norman go their separate ways. It takes the power of friendship and self-discovery for them to reform the team. With UnyX missing in action and the odds stacked against them, can the trio really summon enough cunning and teamwork to save the world?

programme.title: Jade Armor S2 - EP 23
programme.desc: Join Lan Jun, the unlikely Chinese teen hero who inherits a magical suit of armor, and her Beasticon talking animal friends, as they continue to defend their city of Ban Tang, against the Crimson Lord and Black Tiger!

programme.title: Dragons: Riders Of Berk S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: The Vikings of Berk must learn to live alongside dragons. Hiccup and his friends establish the Dragon Academy to train dragons and defend the island from new enemies, primarily the Outcast Tribe led by Alvin the Treacherous.

programme.title: Metal Cardbot S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Chinese) A long time ago, there was a planet named Machina where a race of sentient machines, or Metal Cardbots, resided. One day, the planet suddenly explodes, forcing its inhabitants to live on Earth. To not attract attention, the Cardbots disguise themselves as everyday vehicles.

programme.title: Metal Cardbot S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Chinese) A long time ago, there was a planet named Machina where a race of sentient machines, or Metal Cardbots, resided. One day, the planet suddenly explodes, forcing its inhabitants to live on Earth. To not attract attention, the Cardbots disguise themselves as everyday vehicles.

programme.title: P. King Duckling Adventure Buds - EP 23
programme.desc: This series features three good friends, P. King the silly enthusiastic duckling, Wombat the fluffy book-loving wombat, and Chumpkins the "genius" inventor pig, and their computer assistant Zeusy. For the Adventure Buds, life is all about making every day crazy fun - taking any idea or activity and making it an awesome adventure!

programme.title: P. King Duckling Adventure Buds - EP 24
programme.desc: This series features three good friends, P. King the silly enthusiastic duckling, Wombat the fluffy book-loving wombat, and Chumpkins the "genius" inventor pig, and their computer assistant Zeusy. programme.title: Wonder Park
programme.desc: The imagination of a wildly creative girl comes alive in an amusement park.

programme.title: Alfie's "World of Wow!" - EP 3
programme.desc: How do grass and trees survive under the hot savanna sun? Alfie finds out as he travels to Africa to be dazzled by some stripey zebras and run with the spotted hyenas! Make your very own grasslands and see if you can freeze in time to the music like a dancing giraffe!

programme.title: The Contenders 26 - EP 2
programme.desc: Brazil are gunning for glory under new coach Carlo Ancelotti, Alphonso Davies is Canada's star player, and we look at the futuristic Los Angeles Stadium.

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal - EP 2
programme.desc: MY BEST FRIEND'S AN ANIMAL is an emotive, heart-warming series which tells the stories of humans who have unlikely and extraordinary friendships with wild animals. Featuring 6 compelling stories per episode and filmed all over the world. The series proves that when it comes to friendship, shape, size, or even species is irrelevant. Respect, trust, and understanding can be found in the most surpris

programme.title: Remarkable Places To Eat S3 - EP 1
programme.desc: Leading chefs take host Fred Sirieix to experience the restaurants where they genuinely love to eat and explore what goes into making them so special.

programme.title: The Cube S11 - EP 6
programme.desc: Contestants must battle to win a top prize of 250,000 pounds and each of them must complete apparently simple tasks while under the spotlight in a large perspex cube. Each task is worth a prize and the contestants will have to work hard to stay in the game.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: A brave, beautiful, and brilliant young woman is imprisoned by a beast in his castle. Despite her fears, she learns to see beyond the beast's hideous exterior and realize the gentle heart of the true prince within him.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight
programme.desc: The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Hollywood Squares S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: A reboot of the classic game show, where celebrities face contestants seated at desks arranged vertically. Contestants judge the celebrities' responses to questions to determine winners.

programme.title: The Idea of You
programme.desc: Solène, a 40-year-old single mom, begins an unexpected romance with 24-year-old Hayes Campbell, the lead singer of August Moon, the hottest boy band on the planet.

programme.title: The Transporter Refueled

After the 118 responds to several calls from the same person, Hen steps in to offer them advice; Eddie confronts his parents and takes a big step in his relationship with his son.
The 118 is called to a research lab that has been set on fire and becomes a biohazard.
Athena and Buck are in a race against time to rescue the rest of the 118 following the fire in the biolab.
Following the tragic events at the lab, the 118 must come together to lay their fallen hero to rest; despite her own grief, Athena re-investigates the death of a child to help a grieving mother.
Following an earthquake, the 118 races to the scene of several unusual fires and must figure out their cause before anyone else is hurt.
The 118, still reeling from their recent loss, is dispatched to a mass casualty event after a high-rise apartment building collapses; Athena and Chimney have to work together to save a familiar face.

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 71
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even tho
